title: Implementing Basic WebSocket Echo
statement: Create a WebSocket server using the WebSocket API that echoes back any messages it receives from a client. Your server should have a single endpoint `/api/websocket` that establishes a WebSocket connection. Once connected, clients should be able to send messages to your server, which will then echo back the same message. Your server should use the `ws` library and Express.js.
constraints: Must use the `ws` library for WebSocket functionality
Must use Express.js for setting up the server

endpoints.description: Establishes a WebSocket connection. Once connected, clients can send messages to your server, which will then echo back the same message.
